sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 매출 148억 8,300만 달러·영업이익 33억 6,300만 달러를 기록했으나, 수요·재구조화·인력·IP 리스크가 동시에 남아 있다.

keyPoints.text: 3개월 실적은 매출 14,883백만 달러와 영업이익률 22.6%로 제시돼 수익성 개선 폭이 뚜렷하다.
R&D·S&M·G&A 합계는 6,004백만 달러로, 총비용 비중 40.3%는 비용 효율성이 전기 대비 개선되는 흐름을 보여준다.
현금 및 투자자산은 16,110에서 15,736으로 감소해 분기 내부 자금 순감소가 나타났고, 배당·자사주매입·자본지출이 유동성 운영 부담으로 작동한다.

riskChanges.text: 서비스 제공업체·클라우드 고객 수요는 글로벌 경기 변화에 민감해 판매·구현 주기가 흔들리며 고객 지출 계획 가시성이 떨어질 수 있어 분기 실적의 변동성이 커질 수 있다.
재고 적정 수준 유지와 구매 커밋먼트 이행이 어려워질 수 있고, 통신·네트워킹의 가격·제품 경쟁이 동반되어 매출 및 수익성에 이중 압박을 준다는 점이 강조됐다.
재구조화 활동 자체가 실적·재무에 충격을 줄 수 있고, 동시에 실리콘밸리 등 인력 경쟁과 특허·저작권·상표권이 도전·무효·회피될 수 있다는 지재권 불확실성이 병존한다.

businessChanges.text: 매출총이익률 65.5% 내외에서 영업이익률 22.6%로 이어진 구조는 매출 성장 이외에 비용 통제/비용구조 변화가 실적 견인의 중요한 동인임을 시사한다.
R&D는 2,400으로 증가했고, 경영진은 AI 투자 관련 headcount 및 주식보상 증가를 주요 요인으로, 인수 관련 비용 감소를 상쇄 효과로 설명했다.
영업이익은 3,363으로 발표됐으며, 회사는 하향된 restructuring 및 기타 비용과 매출 성장으로 개선되었다고 명확히 밝혀 전략적 비용 조정의 효과를 강조했다.

financialHighlights.text: 매출은 148억 8,300만 달러, 영업이익은 33억 6,300만 달러, 순이익은 28억 6,000만 달러이다.
총자산은 1,211억 200만 달러이며, 현금및현금성자산은 84억 달러로 재무기초 체력의 크기를 보여준다.

watchItems.text: AI·클라우드·사이버보안 투자로 비용·인력 의존도가 커지는 구간이라, 영업이익률 22.6% 상승이 구조개선인지 일시적 완화 효과인지 구분해 볼 필요가 있다.
총 현금·투자자산이 16,110에서 15,736으로 내려가는 와중에 현금성자산이 84억 달러 수준이라, 향후 주주환원·투자 속도 조절이 단기 유동성 완충에 직접적인 변수다.

Quarter ended 2025-10-25 net income = 28억 6,000만 달러 (USD 2.86B; 2,860 million), XBRL range 2025-07-27..2025-10-25.
Quarter ended 2025-10-25 total assets = 1,211억 200만 달러 (USD 121.102B; 121,102 million), XBRL range instant..2025-10-25.
Quarter ended 2025-10-25 cash and cash equivalents = 84억 달러 (USD 8.4B; 8,400 million), XBRL range instant..2025-10-25.

Item 1A. Risk Factors” of our Annual Report on Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended July 26, 2025. Risks Related to our Business and Industry Our operations can be difficult to predict because our operating results may fluctuate in future periods. Our operating results have been in the past, and will continue to be, subject to quarterly and annual fluctuations as a result of numerous factors, some of which may contribute to more pronounced fluctuations in an uncertain global economic environment. These factors include: • Fluctuations in demand for our products and services, especially with respect to service providers and cloud customers, in part due to changes in the global economic environment • Changes in sales and implementation cycles for our products and reduced visibility into our customers’ spending plans and associated revenue • Our ability to maintain appropriate inventory level

Risks Related to our Business and Industry Our operations can be difficult to predict because our operating results may fluctuate in future periods. Our operating results have been in the past, and will continue to be, subject to quarterly and annual fluctuations as a result of numerous factors, some of which may contribute to more pronounced fluctuations in an uncertain global economic environment. These factors include: • Fluctuations in demand for our products and services, especially with respect to service providers and cloud customers, in part due to changes in the global economic environment • Changes in sales and implementation cycles for our products and reduced visibility into our customers’ spending plans and associated revenue • Our ability to maintain appropriate inventory levels and purchase commitments • Price and product competition in the communications and networking in

Our business may not be more efficient or effective than prior to implementation of such plans. Our restructuring activities, including any related charges and the impact of the related headcount restructurings, could materially harm our business, operating results, and financial condition. Over the long term we intend to invest in engineering, sales, service and marketing activities, and in key priority areas, and these investments may achieve delayed, or lower than expected, benefits which could harm our operating results. While we intend to focus on managing our costs and expenses, over the long term, we also intend to invest in personnel and other resources related to our engineering, sales, service and marketing functions as we realign and dedicate resources on key priority areas, such as AI, cloud, and cybersecurity. We also intend to focus on maintaining leadership in core network

Competition for such personnel is intense, especially in the Silicon Valley area of Northern California and other major United States locations. Stock incentive plans are designed to reward employees for their long-term contributions and provide incentives for them to remain with us. Volatility or lack of positive performance in our stock price or equity incentive awards, or changes to our overall compensation program, including our stock incentive program, resulting from the management of share dilution and share-based compensation expense or otherwise, may also negatively impact our ability to retain key employees. As a result of one or more of these factors, we may increase our hiring in geographic areas outside the United States, which could subject us to additional geopolitical and exchange rate risk. Intellectual Property Our proprietary rights may prove difficult to enforce. We generally rely on patents, copyrights, trademarks, and trade secret laws to establish and maintain proprietary rights in our technology and products. Although we have been issued numerous patents and other patent applications are currently pending, there can be no assurance that any of these patents or other proprietary rights will not be challenged, invalidated, or circumvented or that our rights will, in fact, provide competitive advantages to us. Furthermore, many key aspects of our technology are governed by industry-wide standards, which are usable by all market entrants. In addition, there can be no assurance that patents will be issued from pending applications or that claims allowed on any patents will be sufficiently broad to protect our technology.
